title: xyris scabrifolia
intro: Xyris scabrifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaf yellow-eyed grass. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xyris scabrifolia include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in wound healing and antiseptic applications. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
